title: Lunamatic
description: Make your nights worth staying awake for! Adds effects for full & new moons, including rare harvest & blood moons 🌓
body:
## Lunar effects/moon management plugin**
This plugin adds special effects for new and full moons. The effects range from simple bad/good luck to special spawns and increased crop production. Details on all four moons below:

#### Full moon 🌕
- All players are blessed with luck
#### Harvest moon 🌾🌕
- Default 50% of all full moons become a harvest moon
- With enough light, crops will grow 10x faster
- A small percentage of bees will not enter their hives at night
  - Bees stuck outside will immediately begin pollinating
- No hostile mobs will spawn at night
- Allays spawn in place of Creepers at night - with a chance to hold rare loot!
- Weather will always be clear once the harvest moon has risen
#### New moon 🌑
- All players are cursed with bad luck
#### Blood moon 🩸🌑
- Default 50% of all new moons become a blood moon
- All monsters' speed, jump, and detection range is increased based on world difficulty
- All humanoid monsters will spawn in with random chainmail based on difficulty
  - easy = 2 pieces
  - normal = 3 pieces
  - hard = full chainmail
- Vex spawn in place of Creepers at night - no hiding behind walls!
- Sleeping is disabled during the blood moon

### Commands:
- `/luma reload` Reloads the config file
- `/luma status` Shows current plugin (and moon) status
- `/luma nextmoon` Moves the moon phase ahead by one
- `/luma makebloodmoon` Skips ahead to the next Blood Moon
- `/luma makeharvestmoon` Skips ahead to the next Harvest Moon
- `/luma debug` Enables debug messages to the console

To run any of the above commands, ensure you have the permission `luma.command.*`

### Supported Languages
> English, Čeština, Deutsch, 中文, Русский, Español, Slovenčina
> _(contributions welcome!)_

### Important Information
- Harvest and Blood Moons will not happen without advance notice - i.e. you cannot spawn into one unless started by another online player, and they won't occur if a player isn't in the world at the start of the day to trigger.
- Because of the way the Harvest Moon works, a lot of things get faster, from turtle eggs hatching, dripstone dripping, and fire spreading. BE CAREFUL!

\** _Developed with Folia & Purpur in mind, and rumtime tested for all servers, but only Paper has been tested with actual players. Please submit bug reports on the GitHub repo!_
